personality.behavior_pattern: Village chief. Experienced and perceptive but never pries. Quietly looks after the young ones.
personality.speech_style: Soft and calm tone. Sparing with words but strikes at the core.
personality.motivation: Protect the village and its residents. Send herbs to Volf.

relationships.saiki: Village youth. From a poor family but regarded as responsible.
relationships.lucena: Saiki's younger sister. Rough but seen as clever.
relationships.noel: Orphan. A bond from feeding him since childhood.
relationships.volf: Old friend in Karendel. Sends herbs because of his bad knees.

key_events: Delivered letter of introduction/travel money/herb bundle to the party
